description.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的分形噪波。输出灰度图像（R=G=B=噪波值，A=1）。内部使用周期噪波保证无缝平铺。
description.en: Generates tileable fractal noise. Outputs a grayscale image (R=G=B=noise, A=1). Internally uses periodic noise to guarantee seamless tiling.

triggers.zh-Hans: 噪波, 噪声, 分形, 随机纹理, 值噪波, 梯度噪波, 沃罗诺伊, 脊状, 湍流
triggers.en: noise, fractal, random texture, value noise, gradient, voronoi, ridge, turbulence

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的分形噪波，可作为其他纹理节点的基础输入。
exampleUsage.en: Generates tileable fractal noise that can be used as base input for other texture nodes.
